title: sisymbrium pyrenaicum subsp. hispanicum
intro: Sisymbrium pyrenaicum subsp. hispanicum, a subspecies of the Pyrenean rocket plant, is a flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Sisymbrium pyrenaicum subsp. hispanicum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and act as a natural expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent such as ethanol or glycerin.
